translation: secretary (person who handles general clerical work)
ham (thigh of a hog cured for food)
date, appointment (meeting with a lover or potential lover)
honey (thick, viscous, sweet liquid made by bees)
changing (from one train, bus etc to another)
black ice (thin, dangeous slippery film of ice on a surface)
castellan (governor or caretaker of a castle)
full moon (moon when it is in opposition to the sun)
subtitle, caption (textual versions of the dialog in films)
female publicist (a journalist, often a commentator)
